MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-10-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TERRY FAIRLEY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. THE DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE AT THE HEARING A PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF PERSONAL SERVICE OF THE MOVING PAPERS BY APRIL 28, 2011 AS REQUIRED BY THE 4/28/11 ORDER SHORTENING TIME. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
